test.command: pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3

appliedUpdates.description: Added shared testing note documenting company-prefixed GUI routes for agent-browser validation (use /api/companies slug and navigate with /<slug>/... paths).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify validator expectations for GUI-only features: require ui/src Vitest + typecheck + feature-specified checks, and only require packages/orchestrator-tui Vitest when TUI files are touched or contract explicitly requires it.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for gui-design-expansion-cluster1/2/3/4 each observed a mismatch between SKILL.md step requiring TUI tests and feature contracts that specified UI tests + agent-browser verification only.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate reports that gui-worker skill requires TUI tests for GUI-only features.
